text: Every day, I follow a simple routine that keeps me balanced. I wake up at 6 a.m. and start with stretching, followed by a quick shower and a light breakfast. I then head to work, where I usually spend eight hours. After work, I go for a 30-minute jog or do some strength exercises at home. In the evening, I prepare dinner and relax by reading a book or watching a show. I try to go to bed by 10 p.m. This consistency helps me feel organized and healthy.
